query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `migration_auto_sync` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `masCompanyId` int NOT NULL,
  `masUserId` int NOT NULL,
  `masPlatform` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `masEnabled` boolean DEFAULT true,
  `masFrequency` varchar(16) DEFAULT 'daily',
  `masLastRunAt` bigint,
  `masNextRunAt` bigint,
  `masCreatedAt` bigint NOT NULL,
  `masUpdatedAt` bigint,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_mas_company` (`masCompanyId`),
  KEY `idx_mas_platform` (`masPlatform`)
);
